name: headline
label: Main Headline
default: We're ready when you are. What can we help you quit today?

default.title: Cigarettes & Tobacco
default.story: "I've been smoking for years, but I'm finally ready to break free. With professional support, I know I can do this."

default.title: Vaping & E-Cigarettes
default.story: "I thought vaping was safer, but I'm still addicted to nicotine. I'm ready to get my life back."

default.title: Smokeless & Nicotine Pouches
default.story: "After years of chewing and dipping, my health is suffering. I need help breaking this habit for good."

default.title: Marijuana
default.story: "Cannabis has become part of my daily routine. I want to quit and feel more in control of my life."

default.title: Not Sure? Multiple Products
default.story: "I struggle with more than one substance. I need comprehensive guidance and support for my situation."
